name: yoga-ai-e2e-tests
description: Enterprise E2E Selenium Automation Framework for Yoga AI App

scripts.test:chrome: cross-env BROWSER=chrome HEADLESS=true mocha tests/setup.js tests/selenium_350_testcases.spec.js tests/selenium_400_testcases.spec.js --timeout 120000 --exit
scripts.test:firefox: cross-env BROWSER=firefox HEADLESS=true mocha tests/setup.js tests/selenium_350_testcases.spec.js tests/selenium_400_testcases.spec.js --timeout 120000 --exit
scripts.test:edge: cross-env BROWSER=edge HEADLESS=true mocha tests/setup.js tests/selenium_350_testcases.spec.js tests/selenium_400_testcases.spec.js --timeout 120000 --exit
